Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const raw=c.join\(''\); console.log\(raw\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const logs=JSON.parse\(c.join\(''\)\).data?.deploymentLogs||[]; const filtered=logs.filter\(l=>l.timestamp>'2026-04-23T18:25:44' && l.timestamp<'2026-04-23T18:35:00'\); filtered.forEach\(l=>console.log\(l.timestamp.slice\(11,19\), l.message\)\); }\);")
